ingredients_text:
noodle (73,1%) { wheat flour , modified tapioca starch, palm oil, wheat gluten, salt, glycerin, soybean oil, acidity regulator [potassium carbonate anhydrous (e501(i)), sodium carbonate (e500), sodium phosphate dibasic (e339(ii), citric acid (e330)], thickener [guar gum (e412)], purified water, emulsifier [lecithin (e322)], green tea flavor oil},

soup (24,1%) {water, artificial cheese flavor powder, soy sauce, white sugar, artificial chicken flavor powder, soybean oil, chili pepper powder, red pepper powder, onion, garlic, modified potato starch, chilli extract, paprika extract, black pepper powder, curry powder},

powder (2,8%) {mozzarella cheese powder, roasted sesame, roasted laver},

contains:  wheat ,  gluten ,  soy ,  milk ,  sesame
